headline: Amphenol (APH) Prices €500M Senior Notes Offering Due 2031
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the best US stocks to buy and hold for the next 3 years. On March 24, Amphenol announced the pricing of a €500 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due in 2031. These notes are being issued by its wholly owned German subsidiary, Amphenol Technologies Holding GmbH, and […]

headline: Corning Stock Rises 60.6% in 3 Months: How to Play the Stock
summary: GLW rides on AI data center demand and specialty materials strength, but customer concentration, macro risks and auto weakness cloud the outlook after a sharp surge.
